subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of Abhá! Blessed indeed are those souls who, through the purity of their nature, have become attracted unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی خوشا حال نفوسی که بصرف فطرت منجذب الی الله گشتند
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @martyrs and martyrdom, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
